root_text.an5.238:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.238:1.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.238:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.238:2.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato āvāsiko bhikkhu yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.238:1.1: “Mendicants, a resident mendicant with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.238:1.3: Without examining or scrutinizing, they praise those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an5.238:1.4: and they criticize those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an5.238:1.8: A resident mendicant with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.238:2.1: A resident mendicant with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.238:2.3: After examining and scrutinizing, they criticize those deserving of criticism,
translation_text.an5.238:2.4: and they praise those deserving of praise.
translation_text.an5.238:2.8: A resident mendicant with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
